allow: Bash(node --env-file=.env.local -e "const { execSync } = require\('child_process'\); execSync\('npx prisma db push', { stdio: 'inherit', env: { ...process.env } }\)")
Bash(node --env-file=.env.local -e "const { execSync } = require\('child_process'\); execSync\('npx prisma generate', { stdio: 'inherit', env: { ...process.env } }\)")
Bash(node --env-file=.env.local -e "const { execSync } = require\('child_process'\); execSync\('npx prisma db push && npx prisma generate', { stdio: 'inherit', env: { ...process.env } }\)")
Bash(node --env-file=.env.local -e "const { PrismaClient } = require\('@prisma/client'\); const p = new \(PrismaClient\)\(\); console.log\('story exists:', 'story' in p\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const content = fs.readFileSync\('./node_modules/@prisma/client/index.d.ts', 'utf8'\); console.log\(content.includes\('story'\) ? 'story EXISTS in client' : 'story MISSING from client'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const s=fs.readFileSync\('./prisma/schema.prisma','utf8'\);console.log\(s.includes\('Story'\)?'Story IN SCHEMA':'Story NOT IN SCHEMA'\);console.log\(s.includes\('StoryType'\)?'StoryType IN SCHEMA':'StoryType NOT IN SCHEMA'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const c=fs.readFileSync\('./node_modules/.prisma/client/index.d.ts','utf8'\);console.log\(c.includes\('story'\)?'story EXISTS':'story MISSING'\);console.log\(c.includes\('Story'\)?'Story EXISTS':'Story MISSING'\);const models=[...c.matchAll\(/  \(\\w+\): \(\\w+\)Delegate/g\)].map\(m=>m[1]\);console.log\('Models:',models.slice\(0,15\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const c=fs.readFileSync\('./node_modules/.prisma/client/schema.prisma','utf8'\);console.log\(c.includes\('Story'\)?'Story IN GENERATED SCHEMA':'Story NOT IN GENERATED SCHEMA'\);console.log\(c.slice\(c.indexOf\('model Story'\),c.indexOf\('model Story'\)+200\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c=fs.readFileSync\('./node_modules/.prisma/client/default.js','utf8'\); const m=c.match\(/runtimeDataModel.*?models.*?}/s\); console.log\(c.includes\('story'\)?'story in runtime JS':'story NOT in runtime JS'\); console.log\(c.includes\('\\"story\\"'\)?'story key found':'story key NOT found'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c=fs.readFileSync\('./node_modules/.prisma/client/default.js','utf8'\); const models=c.match\(/\\"\(\\w+\)\\":\\{fields:/g\)?.map\(m=>m.replace\('\\"',''\).split\('\\"'\)[0]\); console.log\('Models in runtime:', models?.slice\(0,20\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c=fs.readFileSync\('./node_modules/.prisma/client/default.js','utf8'\); console.log\(c.includes\('story'\)?'story IN runtime JS':'story NOT in runtime JS'\); console.log\('File size:',c.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c=fs.readFileSync\('./node_modules/.prisma/client/index.js','utf8'\); console.log\('story in index.js:', c.includes\('story'\)\); console.log\('Story in index.js:', c.includes\('Story'\)\); console.log\('File size:', c.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c=fs.readFileSync\('./node_modules/.prisma/client/client.js','utf8'\); console.log\('story in client.js:', c.includes\('story'\)\); console.log\('File size:', c.length\); console.log\(c.slice\(0,300\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c=fs.readFileSync\('./node_modules/.prisma/client/index.js','utf8'\); const idx=c.indexOf\('runtimeDataModel'\); console.log\('runtimeDataModel found:', idx>=0\); if\(idx>=0\) { const snippet=c.slice\(idx,idx+500\); console.log\(snippet\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c=fs.readFileSync\('./node_modules/.prisma/client/index.js','utf8'\); const m=c.match\(/runtimeDataModel = JSON\\.parse\\\(\\"\(.+?\)\\"\\\)/s\); if\(m\){const data=JSON.parse\(m[1].replace\(/\\\\\\\\\\"/g,'\\"'\)\); console.log\('Models in runtime:', Object.keys\(data.models\)\);} else {console.log\('pattern not matched'\);}")
Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); try { fs.rmSync\('.next', {recursive:true, force:true}\); console.log\('.next cache deleted'\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\('Error:', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "const{execSync}=require\('child_process'\);try{const r=execSync\('taskkill /F /PID 17540',{stdio:'pipe'}\);console.log\(r.toString\(\)\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('Process already gone or no permission'\)}")
